entities.description: bookindex is a proposed hierarchical structure aware index designed to capture logical hierarchy and entity relations within complex documents
tree construction is the first stage of the two stage process that parses document layout to establish hierarchical nodes
graph construction is the second stage of the process that extracts fine grained entity knowledge and refines it
a novel gradient based entity resolution method used to refine entity knowledge during graph construction
document refers to the complex documents within which the bookindex captures logical hierarchy and entity relations
logical hierarchy is the explicit structure within complex documents that the bookindex is designed to capture
entity relations are the intricate connections within complex documents that the bookindex is designed to capture
hierarchical nodes are the categorized units established by the tree construction process
fine grained entity knowledge is the detailed information extracted from tree nodes during the graph construction process

relations.description: bookindex utilizes tree construction as its first stage to parse document layout and establish hierarchical nodes
bookindex utilizes graph construction as its second stage to extract and refine entity knowledge
graph construction refines entity knowledge using the novel gradient based entity resolution method
bookindex is designed to operate on complex documents to capture their internal structures
bookindex is explicitly designed to capture the explicit logical hierarchy found in documents
bookindex is explicitly designed to capture the intricate entity relations found in documents
tree construction parses document layout to establish hierarchical nodes
graph construction extracts fine grained entity knowledge from tree nodes
graph construction operates on the tree nodes established by tree construction to extract knowledge
